name: Break-Even Funnel (Front-End Strategy)
category: Traffic / Advanced — Strategy overlay (applied to a chosen front-end funnel)
lengthClass: variable — inherits the length of the chosen base funnel (short for tripwire/book, medium for SLO, long for webinar)
buildableNote: A strategic CATEGORY, not a single page recipe. You pick a base front-end funnel (squeeze->offer, tripwire, SLO, book, or webinar) and CALIBRATE its order bumps + OTOs so cold ad spend is recovered before any follow-up sequence runs.

goals: Recover 100% of cold ad spend on the front end so paid traffic can scale 'unlimited' ($1 in -> $1 out, all backend = profit).
Convert a leaky front-end funnel into a self-liquidating one by adding/tuning order bumps and OTOs.
signals: Client is (or wants to be) running cold paid traffic and is losing money on the front end.
There is already a value ladder / backend, so front-end profit isn't required — break-even is enough to scale.
Client asks 'how do I make my ads profitable / scale without going broke'.
antiSignals: Pure organic/free-traffic business with no ad spend to recover — break-even math is moot.
No upsell inventory exists yet — build the value-ladder offers first.

pageStructure.purpose: Acquire the buyer cheaply via the chosen base funnel: squeeze->SLO sales page, 2-step tripwire, free-plus-shipping book, or webinar registration.
elements: Base-funnel hero (VSL or sales letter or registration per chosen type)
Low-friction front-end price point ($0 F+S to $97 SLO)
Single clear CTA into the order/registration step

pageStructure.purpose: Capture lead on step 1 (recover abandons), bill on step 2, and lift AOV with an order bump — the first break-even lever.
elements: Step 2: billing + a checkbox ORDER BUMP (complementary, high-margin)
Edwards-style bump copy ('Add ___ for just $X — yes, add it to my order')

pageStructure.purpose: First one-click upsell that pushes the funnel to break-even on cold traffic.
elements: The Stack restated for the upsell

pageStructure.purpose: Second upsell or a downsell for those who declined OTO 1 — final break-even lever.
elements: Higher-tier upsell OR downsell of OTO 1 at lower price/payment plan

pageStructure.purpose: Confirm the order and bridge the new buyer to the backend value ladder (where the real profit lives).
elements: High-value bonus or next-step CTA into the backend offer

copyFramework.primaryPersona: Russell Brunson — DotCom Secrets persona (The Funnel Architect): Star/Story/Solution sales letter script, the Value Ladder, Who/What/Why/How lead logic, Soap Opera Sequence + Daily Seinfeld follow-up.
supportingPersonas: Russell Brunson — Expert Secrets persona (The Attractive Character / Expert): Epiphany Bridge story script, the Big Domino, false-belief patterns (vehicle/internal/external), Perfect Webinar, The Stack and Close, Hook-Story-Offer.
Jim Edwards — Copywriting Secrets persona (The Copy Mechanic): the Big Promise headline formulas, fascination/curiosity bullets, the order-bump and OTO close formulas, the 'one-sentence' hook.
scripts: Star/Story/Solution (DotCom Secrets) for an SLO/sales-letter base; Perfect Webinar for a webinar base.
The Stack and Close (Expert Secrets) restated on each OTO to justify the climbing price.
Jim Edwards order-bump + OTO close formulas — short, decisive, value-vs-price framed.
copyFramework.notes: Copy is whatever the BASE funnel demands; the break-even discipline is in the MATH, not new copy. The order bump and OTOs are the load-bearing revenue levers — write them with the most conviction.

pages: Build the chosen base funnel in GHL (Funnel for tripwire/SLO/book; or Webinar-style funnel).
Add a 2-step order step, then OTO1 step, then OTO2/Downsell step, then Confirmation step — all as one GHL Funnel.
Enable GHL one-click upsell on OTO steps (no re-enter card).
skill44Widgets: Skill 44 Order Form widget with ORDER BUMP enabled on the payment step.
Skill 44 Form widget for the step-1 contact capture (abandon recovery).
For a webinar base: Skill 44 registration Form + reminder workflow.
automations: Workflow: abandoned step-1 contact -> cart-abandon email/SMS sequence.
Workflow: purchaser -> backend value-ladder nurture (Soap Opera -> Daily Seinfeld).
Reporting: front-end revenue vs ad spend dashboard to verify break-even is hit BEFORE follow-up runs.
ghlBuild.notes: Skill 6 instantiates the base funnel + OTO chain; Skill 44 builds the order form with bump and the contact form. The deliverable includes a break-even calculator note: (front-end price + bump take-rate*bump price + OTO take-rate*OTO price) must >= cold CPA.

metrics: Cost per acquisition (CPA) vs front-end revenue per buyer
